posts.title: Fivetran + dbt: An open, agent-ready future for data teams
posts.author: Anjan Kundavaram
posts.description: Announces collaboration between Fivetran and dbt for data team workflows, focusing on an open, agent-ready future.

posts.title: Modern data stack vs. Open Data Infrastructure
posts.author: Amy Peterson
posts.description: Compares the modern data stack approach with emerging open data infrastructure patterns.

posts.title: The enterprise data infrastructure benchmark report 2026
posts.author: Fivetran
posts.description: Annual benchmark report covering enterprise data infrastructure trends and performance in 2026.

posts.title: 85% of enterprises are running agentic AI on a data foundation that isn't ready
posts.author: Taylor Brown
posts.description: Research finding that most enterprises are deploying agentic AI without adequate underlying data infrastructure.

entries.title: HTTP Request Object: Per-Sync Custom Headers
entries.description: HTTP Request object syncs now support per-sync custom headers across HTTP Request destination and within NetSuite/HubSpot integrations.

entries.title: HTTP Request: JSON Body Support on DELETE
entries.description: DELETE operations in HTTP Request destination can now accept JSON and URL-encoded request bodies.

entries.title: Activations User List and Invitation APIs Deprecated
entries.description: Fivetran deprecated Activations API user and invitation endpoints, directing developers toward standard Fivetran Users endpoints with improved capabilities and authentication.

entries.title: Microsoft Dynamics: Service Principal Authentication
entries.description: Microsoft Dynamics connector now offers Service Principal authentication as an alternative to existing OAuth options in connection settings.

entries.title: Owner Roles Can Assign Custom Roles
entries.description: Workspace Owners in Fivetran Activations now have permission to assign custom roles to members, expanding access control beyond account administrators.

entries.title: Zendesk: V2 Custom Object Lookup Field Support
entries.description: Zendesk connector supports lookup fields on v2 custom objects, allowing mapping to fields referencing other objects like Users or Organizations.

entries.title: LinkedIn Ads: Multiple ID Sync for Customer Audiences
entries.description: LinkedIn Ads connector enables syncing multiple identifiers simultaneously for customer matching beyond individual emails and advertising IDs.

entries.title: HTTP Request: Client Credentials OAuth Support
entries.description: HTTP Request destination supports Client Credentials OAuth grant type for server-to-server authentication without user login requirements.

entries.title: Trigger Activation Syncs from Connections and Transformations
entries.description: Activation syncs automatically trigger based on upstream Fivetran connections and transformations, configured through sync trigger settings.

entries.title: Salesforce: FinancialAccount Object Support
entries.description: Salesforce connector now includes FinancialAccount object support for Financial Services Cloud customers.
